title: Sniper Game
description:
Every player's full stats — live and always up to date — are tracked on the official website. Find the link in the "Visit the website" section.Where Legends Take Their Shot Sniper Game is a first-person sniper challenge built around a single, razor-sharp goal: prove that 
you are the best shot in the world. No bloated campaign, no filler missions — just one handcrafted

battleground, relentless waves of enemies, and a global leaderboard watching every shot you take.

 A True World Championship Every player fights on the same battleground, against the same waves, under the same rules. No 
unfair advantages — only skill. Every run you complete is scored and ranked against snipers from all over the planet. Climb the standings, defend your place, and earn your spot among the champions.

 Two Buildings. Two Championships. The same battlefield can be fought from two completely different positions — and each one is ranked 
on its own separate leaderboard:

 

• Sniper Building — Take the high ground. Choose your targets at range and control the 
 battlefield through your scope. You live or die by your patience and precision. 

• Enemy Building — Fight from the enemy's own ground. Closer, faster and far more dangerous, with no comfortable distance to hide behind. A test of pure nerve under pressure. 

 Each building carries its own full progression — six levels of three escalating waves — playable by 
day and by night.

 

 

Three Ways to Become a Legend Every building ranks you in three separate categories. Chase a single crown, or chase them all:

 

• Accuracy — The cleanest run wins: the most shots on target, the most headshots, the least
 wasted ammo. For the sniper who simply does not miss.

• Speed — A race against the clock. Only one thing matters — how fast you can clear the
 waves. For the fastest trigger in the world.

• Universal — The ultimate ranking, a combined score built from both your accuracy and your
 speed. You cannot win it by being only precise or only fast — you have to be both.

 

Key Features 

• One handcrafted battleground, endlessly replayable

• Two buildings — each its own World Championship

• Three global ranking categories per building: Accuracy, Speed, Universal

• Six levels of three escalating waves

• Day and night conditions

• A live worldwide Steam leaderboard — climb it, defend it, own it

• Built with Unreal Engine 5

 

 Add Sniper Game to your wishlist and be ready when the championship opens.
description_short: Sniper Game is a first-person precision shooter built on a single idea: prove you are the best shot in the world. One handcrafted battleground, relentless escalating waves, and a global leaderboard scoring every shot. Two buildings, three rankings — climb the World Championship.
